title: ServiceAccount
description: Machine credential for inter-service authentication. Bound to one Application via `application_id` (RESTRICT, immutable after creation). Optionally tenant-scoped via `tenant_id` (CASCADE) for tenant-specific integrations. Carries its OWN `signer_kid` (loose reference to `auth::jwt_signing_keys.kid`) for per-account revocation isolation. Mandatory rotation via `expires_at` (default 90-day TTL). NEVER carries `identity_id` — SAs are a distinct principal class from human users. One of the eight rows carrying `application_id` DIRECTLY per `.kiro/steering/tenancy-columns.md` §2.

x-database.description: Machine credentials table. `application_id` REQUIRED + immutable. `tenant_id` OPTIONAL (must match application_id's tenants when populated). `signer_kid` loose reference to auth::jwt_signing_keys.kid — no schema-level FK.

application_id.description: Required FK. Binds SA to exactly one Application. Immutable after creation. Restrict on delete to prevent orphaning.

tenant_id.description: Optional FK. When populated, scopes the SA to a specific tenant. Cascade on delete: erasing tenant hard-deletes tenant-scoped SAs. Observer enforces tenant.application_id === row.application_id (APPLICATION_MISMATCH_ON_TENANT).

name.description: Human-readable identifier. Unique per application_id. Validated by valid_service_account_name rule.

is_enabled.description: Soft-disable flag. Runtime middleware refuses requests when false. Existing JWTs remain valid until natural exp.

signer_kid.description: Per-SA JWT signing key identifier. Loose reference to `auth::jwt_signing_keys.kid` — validated at write time by observer, not enforced by schema FK because kid lifecycle is owned by the auth module.

secret_hash.description: Bcrypt hash of the rotation secret (cost 12). Never plaintext. Never returned on any wire projection. Overwritten on every rotation.

secret_rotated_at.description: Stamped on creation + every rotation. Drives days_since_rotation accessor + rotation-hygiene dashboards.

expires_at.description: Mandatory rotation deadline. NULL = never expires (discouraged; use only for platform-critical bootstrap SAs with matching ops runbook). Default TTL 90 days at creation + every rotation.

last_used_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent successful JWT verification. Updated async by UpdateLastUsedTimestampJob to bound write pressure.

last_used_ip.description: Source IP of the most recent successful request. Updated async alongside last_used_at.

status.description: Computed categorical status derived from is_enabled + expires_at + last_used_at. Observer recomputes on every mutation. Convenience field for wire projections + list-filtering.

metadata.description: Free-form ops metadata (ip_allowlist array for enterprise-tier SAs, deployment hints, integration-specific config). Never stores secret material.

created_by.description: Actor who created the row (platform_admin CLI or HTTP).

deleted_at.description: Soft-delete marker. Retention hold clock starts here.

indexes.name: service_accounts_application_name_unique
indexes.description: Partial UNIQUE on live rows only. SAs scoped to different Applications may share a name.

indexes.name: service_accounts_scope_lookup_idx
indexes.description: Composite index for the active-account lookup on the platform-admin list surface + audit correlation.

indexes.name: service_accounts_kid_idx
indexes.description: Fast lookup for kid-burn cascade + JWKS-endpoint enumeration.

indexes.name: service_accounts_expiry_scan_idx
indexes.predicate: expires_at IS NOT NULL AND is_enabled = true AND deleted_at IS NULL
indexes.description: Partial index for NotifyRotationDueJob's warning-window scan + PurgeExpiredServiceAccountsJob's expire-pass scan.

indexes.name: service_accounts_dormant_scan_idx
indexes.predicate: is_enabled = true AND deleted_at IS NULL
indexes.description: Partial index for DetectDormantServiceAccountJob's dormant-threshold scan.

indexes.name: service_accounts_status_idx
indexes.description: Filter acceleration for list surface + gauge metric computation.

indexes.name: service_accounts_retention_scan_idx
indexes.description: Scan predicate for PurgeExpiredServiceAccountsJob's hard-delete pass.

tenant_slug.description: Computed. Joined from tenants.slug when tenant_id is populated.

is_expired.description: Computed. expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at < now().

is_expiring_soon.description: Computed. expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at BETWEEN now() AND now() + INTERVAL 'warning_days_before_expiry days'.

days_until_expiry.description: Computed. NULL when expires_at IS NULL; otherwise (expires_at - now()) / 86400 in days (may be negative for expired rows).

days_since_last_used.description: Computed. NULL when last_used_at IS NULL (never used); otherwise (now() - last_used_at) / 86400.

never_projected: The plaintext exchange secret except at creation + rotation response (returned ONCE, never re-retrievable)

x-route-binding.notes: SA is a URL parameter only on platform-admin routes; tenant-audience routes do not bind it. Binding is always by ULID.
